title: Budget Brainstorm
content: Alice suggested a $45k cap for Q3 marketing after Charlie confirmed finance only had $45k available. Bob argued for an influencer-heavy strategy, wanting at least $20k for influencer campaigns. Decision on the exact split is pending until Friday's meeting in Room 4B.

title: Sprint Retro
content: Action item: follow up on the influencer contract. Bob is responsible for leading the influencer campaigns and will drive the contract to signature. Team agreed influencers are the highest-ROI channel this quarter.
